focus_points: Audit RR-AUTH-01 closure evidence for verification debt across TODO, package, checkpoint, review merges, triple-audit session, validation evidence, waivers, and durable-doc promotion.
Check whether closure claims are backed by commands, artifacts, or accepted-debt rationale.
Check whether durable source-of-truth conclusions were promoted to canonical module docs instead of only tactical notes.
Check whether remaining blockers are explicit and not hidden as clean evidence.
goal: Determine whether RR-AUTH-01 can close without hidden verification debt, or identify the exact remaining closure/evidence blockers.
